GAME RULES

  • 1 Pick up shapes from the bottom dock. Use the glowing GO Circles under each piece to drag them.
  • 2 Complete lines across any of the 3 hex axes. Score points to advance levels; blockers appear as you play.
  • 3 Your progress is broadcasted to the **Live Lobby**! Level up to unlock **20 different music tracks**.
